text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After training, I visit the library to do<n>some
research.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: The world is so marvelous! ☆ Life is<n>marvelous! ★

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... The day's almost over, but<n>you're still as
happy as ever...

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's you, Nature!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Don't you feel marvelous today? I'm<n>feeling quite
marvelous, myself! ☆

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, yeah... I'd say I'm feeling the<n>same as
usual.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: What are you writing? "Marvelous<n>World..."

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: It's my Marvelous World Plan!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
The world is filled with marvelous<n>things!
However, no one seems to<n>realize it! It's such a
shame!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Uh, it feels too late to ask, but I'm not<n>quite sure
what you mean by<n>"marvelous."

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Marvelous means something that<n>astounds you!
Miracles, happiness,<n>good fortune! These are
marvelous!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Think for a moment. In the beginning,<n>there was
the big bang, right? Do you<n>know what the
chances of the Earth<n>forming were? One in ten to
the<n>hundred-and-fifty-thousandth power!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
And the chances that life would<n>spring up was
only one in ten to the<n>forty-thousandth power!
What else<n>can you call that besides an absolute
miracle?!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
And to think that Umamusume came<n>to exist on
top of that! No words can<n>describe how marvelous
it is! ☆ This<n>is all to say that—

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Er, sorry. I'm really not following you<n>at all...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I'm getting pretty sleepy all<n>of a sudden...
for some... reason...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Where am I?!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Welcome, Nature! ☆ This is the<n>Marvelous
Dimension! ★

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Are you in search of glimmering<n>marvelousness?
Or perhaps pure<n>marvelousness?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Uh? Actually, I don't think I'm in<n>search of ei—

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Wow! You're so honest! So cool! Sobrave!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
I shall grant you a reward! ☆ For such<n>honesty, I
bestow upon you the<n>world's most radiant
marvelousness!<n>★

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Look, I still don't get what you're<n>rambling on
about. This is actually<n>kind of cree—wait! Am I
dreaming?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Uh, huh? Looks like I'm back.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Good morning, Nature! ★ You<n>looked so
marvelous while you were<n>asleep! ☆

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
All my talk of marvelous things must<n>have
soothed you into a marvelous<n>slumber. ☆ Ahaha! ★
Ahahaha! ☆

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ahaha... Marvelousness... Scary stuff.
